titleStmt.title: SII 15.530: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 530. (B.K. No. 239 of 1928-29.) MORAB, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Hanumantadēva temple.
This is dated Śaka 981, Vikāri, Kāttika śu. 2, Wednesday, Pūrvāshāḍhā-nakshatra. The details correspond to 1059 A.D. November 10, f.d.n. °50, if the month is Mārggaśira.

It records the death by Sanyasana-vidhi of the Jaina teacher Nāgachandra-Siddhāntadēva, in the Ghaṭāntakiya-basadi at Moramba. Nāgachandra who is praised as a great scholar and advocate of the Jaina doctrine, was the disciple of Jayakīrtti and belonged to Kārēya-gaṇa and Mailāpa-tīrtha of Yānnīya-sangha. The nisidige memorial bearing the epigraph was set up by his disciple Kanakaśakti Siddhāntadēva. The epigraph is composed both in Sanskrit and Kannaḍa verse, supplemented by prose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatparamagaṁbhīra svādvādāmō The following is engraved on the top of the slab to the left.
śrīmannā-
gacaṁdra
siddāntadēvaṁ .
damaged
śrīyāpanīyāṁbudhipūrṇnacandrō maiḷāpatīrtthābharaṇō ga
ṇōbhūt kārēya mā pratibuddhatatvairācāryyavaryyai
ṛprathitaṟpṛthivyāṁ . tatrājani śrī jayakīrttidēvasiddāntaśu
ddhēddhasamṛddhabuddhiścāritracuṁcurgguṇa rbhūpāḷa mau
ḷārccitapādapadmaḥ . yō bhūribhavābdhipāragamanē saṁ
nē pātrāyatē yō lōkēśa jinēśadharmma tyāśēśa śōkāyatē
yō darppōddhata darppa mathanē nnagēndrāyatē sōyaṁ śrī
jayakīrttināma bhagavān bhavyābjinī bhāskaraḥ . śiṣyaśśīḷanidhissuni
ścitavidhissadvṛttaratnāṁbudhiśśāntaḥkantupadāntakō guṇagaṇairvvibhrā
jamānōgraṇīrjātastasya vinamrabhorinarapaḥ śrī nāgacaṁdrō ya
tiḥ siddhāṁtādisamastaśāstranipuṇaḥ khyātōdhidhātrītaḷaṁ . niśśēṣaṁ bha
vabhāvibhūtamatuḷaṁ jyōtirvvidāvidyasau tatvaṁ yasya padāravindama
khiḷakṣmāpāḷacūḍāmaṇiḥ jātaṁ nītisamastamantraviṣayaḥ kīrttyaṁga
nāsaṁgataḥ śaśvadbhāti mahōmahāguṇanidhiḥ śrī nāgacaṁdrō yatiḥ
satyaṁ svēna sarasvatīpriyasatīprītyāmahatyā dhṛtā prāptānāprati
nōhi samayā sākṣātsapatnyā puraḥ digvāsō stutayōti pa
tiniḥśēṣaṁ dharitrītaḷaṁ sākṣīkṛtya budhānasūyati sadā
caṁdrāśinaṁ . kīrtti jyōtsnāvadāpātīkṛta sakaḷakaḷāśāṁbaraḥ śrī
saḥ siddhāṁtāṁbhōdhi�®ddhiprabhavavibhavajātaṁ
dvṛttā saumyakāṁti prathitadharaṇibhṛnmūrddhnivinyastapādō jīyā
gacaṁdrō yatipatirava vyōmani maḷēṁduḥ . kṣōṇīnā
kirīṭaṣ®ṣṭacaraṇaḥ kāmēbhakaṇṭhīravōtītānāgatavarttamānani
dūraśrutijñānabhāk siddhāṁtāmṛtavārddhivarddhanavidhuḥ sanmaṁ
tracūḍāmaṇiḥ hōrāśāstraviśāradō vijayatāṁ śrīnāga
caṁdrō guruḥ . suragajada rajataś�ḷada śaradabhrada dhavaḷapuṇḍa
rīkada śuṁbhad harahāsada bēḷpanadhaḥkaripudu śrīnāracaṁdra
munipatiya yaśa . yō dūraśravaṇādilōkadayitā vi
jñā�vidyānarō yō duṣṭagrahanigrahē paṭutamō maṁtrasphu
ṭō gāruḍaḥ citraṁ dāruṇaśākinī bhayakaraḥ śrīmaṁtracūḍāmaṇiṁ
muktvā viśruta nāgacaṁdramunipaṁ kasmin labhaṁtē padaṁ . jitapaṁ
cēṁdriya bāppa manmathamadapradhvaṁsi jīhayya sa(ṁ)nmaṁtra rā
gētarabhaṁ majhamma bhuvanaprastutya hō hō yaśōnidhidēva
vrati jīya jīya bababāppeṁdintu kaivāradiṁ stutigeyguṁ
sale nāgacaṁdramuniyaṁ viśvaṁbharānuṇḍaḷaṁ . jināgamābdhi
rjjayakīrttidēvastanmaukhamukhyōjani nāgacaṁdraḥ siddhāṁtaśa
bdāgamatatvavēdī rājēṁdracūḍāmaṇicuṁbitāṁhriḥ . ©
śākābdē bhūgajāṁkapramitiparimitē vatsarē sadvikāryāṁ Ū
rjjē śukladvitīyāhani nutakaraṇē kaulavē saumyavārē pūrvvā
ṣāḍābhidhābhē sati sadabhimatē gaṁḍayōgē moraṁbē prāptaḥ
śrīmaṁtracūḍāmaṇiranurapuraṁ nāgacaṁdrō munīṁdraḥ . svasti sa
mastabhuvanavaḷayaniratiśayakēvaḷajñānatritīyanētra
rājamānabhagavadarhatsarvvajñavītūgaparamēśvarapara
mabhaṭṭārakamaṁkhakamaḷavinirggata sadasadādi dasamā
dhi samāḷiṁgita samastavasu prakṣēpaṇa pravīṇa rāddhāntā
mṛtapārāvārapāragarumanēkanṛpatimakuṭataṭakhaci
tamaṇigaṇakiraṇajaḷadhārādhauta�tapūta caraṇāravi
ndaruṁ vibudhajanamanaṟpuṇḍarīkavanamārttaṇḍarumatītānā
gatavarttamānakāladūraśravaṇavijñānakuśaḷaruṁ brahma
rākṣasa bhūtapiśācabhayaṁkaṁruṁ śākinīdarppa
daḷanaruṁ gāruḍecakravarttigaḷuṁ jainaśāsana mūḷastaṁ
bharumeppa śrīmannāgacaṁdrasiddāntadēvarmmoramba
da ghaṭāntakiya basadiyoḷ saṁnyasanavidhiyiṁ muḍipi
svarggastharādaravargge parōkṣavinayameṁdavara śiṣyarkkanakaśa
ktisiddhāntadēvarnnisidigeyakallaṁ nilisidar . jagadabhinutaraṁ
pragarbharaṁ karaṁ kēḷagaṇitaguṇa
ṭṭane pogaḷadarārnnāgacaṁdrasiddhāṁtigaraṁ . maṁgaḷaṁ © © ©
sarasvatī gaṇadāsi bammōja besageyda © © ©
